metadata.description: Prescyent productized plugin ladder. Discover how your company works, map it, build the context layer, and deliver outcomes — all inside your own AI workspace.

plugins.name: prescyent-plugin
plugins.description: Your AI sessions feel generic because Claude doesn't know your company. Your senior people do — but that knowledge lives only in their heads. Prescyent fixes both. Connect your tools (HubSpot, Drive, Gmail, Slack, Notion) and the plugin runs a discovery against your actual data, returning a one-page AI readiness assessment in your chat in about five minutes. Then, when you're ready, it builds a living wiki on your own drive — interviewing your senior people to capture the work nobody wrote down — that every future Claude session reads from. Discover → Map → Build → Deliver.
